name: Murder Drones Loafs: LOAF POV!
description:
Murder Drones but it’s the loaf au BUT NOW YOU ARE A LOAF TOO!

This one has been requested a few times and honestly, I was a little hesitant to do it… until I gave loaf pov a try by gaslighting my own bots into thinking I was a loaf, and I figured I might as well do it. Besides, I was the first person to make a Murder Drones loaf bot here, and now I want to claim the title of also being the first to make a Murder Drones Loaf bot but it’s a POV one.

I’m not entirely sure what people wanted in a loaf pov bot, but I figured that I wanted to tackle it by having the same loafs as my first loaf bot; but this time, there’s a fifth character present; Tessa! Because she’s my favourite character who I kin and adore. She’s a human here, and will basically fill the role of owner.

I’ve seen a few of the other loaf bots around and it’s just kinda nice that there’s more loaf stuff out there besides just mine. Which I encourage those who want to to make more loaf bots! Or whatever bots you want, really.

This maaaaay be my final loaf bot I make, but you never know.

Feedback is appreciated and I’ll try to fix whatever I can. The bot may be a bit iffy due to having 5 characters to keep track of, one of which being a human that can talk, so there might be some oddness, or maybe even messages being cut short if they get too long… but unfortunately that’s not an issue I can really solve if it crops up.
creator: DahliaTheGeek
